title: Assemble and maintain beekeeping components
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assemble and maintain beekeeping components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to assemble or repair hive components

pcs.text: Confirm construction plans, hive components, other materials and equipment required for hive assembly, repair and treatment with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm construction plans, hive components, other materials and equipment required for hive assembly, repair and treatment with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm construction plans, hive components, other materials and equipment required for hive assembly, repair and treatment with supervisor.

pcs.text: Check and inspect stored hive components for availability and suitability for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and inspect stored hive components for availability and suitability for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and inspect stored hive components for availability and suitability for use.

pcs.text: Remove faulty components from store and replace, repair or discard according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove faulty components from store and replace, repair or discard according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove faulty components from store and replace, repair or discard according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and take action according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and take action according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and take action according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to assemble or repair hive components

elements.title: Assemble or repair hive components

pcs.text: Inspect hives to identify necessary repairs, scope of job, materials and tools required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect hives to identify necessary repairs, scope of job, materials and tools required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect hives to identify necessary repairs, scope of job, materials and tools required.

pcs.text: Treat hive components where inspection or testing indicated presence of pests or diseases according to supervisor instructions, biosecurity procedures and product label
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Treat hive components where inspection or testing indicated presence of pests or diseases according to supervisor instructions, biosecurity procedures and product label?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat hive components where inspection or testing indicated presence of pests or diseases according to supervisor instructions, biosecurity procedures and product label.

pcs.text: Assemble or repair hive components according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble or repair hive components according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble or repair hive components according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Apply treatments to preserve hive components appropriate for materials used and according to workplace procedures, product label and safety data sheets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply treatments to preserve hive components appropriate for materials used and according to workplace procedures, product label and safety data sheets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply treatments to preserve hive components appropriate for materials used and according to workplace procedures, product label and safety data sheets.

pcs.text: Mark hive components with beekeeper identifier according to state or territory legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark hive components with beekeeper identifier according to state or territory legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark hive components with beekeeper identifier according to state or territory legislation.

pcs.text: Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor.

pcs.text: Maintain a clean and safe work site while working
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a clean and safe work site while working?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a clean and safe work site while working.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assemble or repair hive components

elements.title: Clean up on completion of work

pcs.text: Return, store or dispose of materials according to workplace waste management and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return, store or dispose of materials according to workplace waste management and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return, store or dispose of materials according to workplace waste management and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store equipment.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Clean up on completion of work

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
